Interface Renderable

All Known Subinterfaces:
ActiveSkill
All Known Implementing Classes:
Arrow, Aura, BiocatalystCore, Boomerang, BoomerangWeapon, Boss, Bow, ChaosCore, Charger, Chest, CrossSlash, CryptoCore, DamageText, DataCore, DynamoCore, Enemy, EnergyDrink, EntropyCore, Experience, Explosion, FractalCore, GameObject, JumpingSlash, KineticCore, LightningEffect, LightningWeapon, MatrixCore, Obstacle, OrbitRock, OverClockCore, OverHeatCore, PlasmaCore, Player, Projectile, ResonanceCore, Rock, SiphonCore, Slash, SomaticCore, Steak, SurgeCore, Sword, Ultimate, VectorCore, Weapon
public interface Renderable
An interface for any game object that can be drawn on the screen.
